title: Hands-on training deck
description: Create a workshop deck with exercises and presenter notes.

question.query: Create a 12-15 slide internal workshop deck that teaches support agents how to review AI-agent task traces. Include learning objectives, examples, practice exercises, answer keys in speaker notes, and a closing checklist.
question.query_chinese: 制作一份 12-15 页的内部工作坊 PPT，用于教支持 agent 如何审查 AI agent 任务 trace。包括学习目标、示例、练习、写在演讲备注中的答案 key，以及结尾检查清单。
